subject: Review correctness, API design, type safety, and maintainability risks
description: Analyze backend and frontend code for blockers and non-blocking findings.

blocking_candidates: Workflow and upload endpoints accept missing/inconsistent foreign keys and may 500 against Postgres while SQLite tests pass.
Frontend tsconfig.node emits JS config files that can shadow TS configs.
Test coverage only exercises health/default workflow, not CRUD/error contracts.
